caption: Table 117. Document revision history
rows: Updated document title. Updated Table 2: STM32L433xx family device features and peripheral counts. Updated Section 3.15.3: VBAT battery voltage monitoring. Updated Table 85: COMP characteristics. Updated Table 101: USB electrical characteristics. Added Section : SWPMI characteristics. Updated Table 115: Package thermal characteristics.
